entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Tutor AI percuma untuk pelajar yang mahu memahami, bukan menyalin.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Aliran kerja AI keluarga yang baik sepatutnya menjadikan pelajar lebih berdikari, bukan lebih bergantung. Ibu bapa boleh menggunakan halaman awam untuk melihat tujuan setiap mod sebelum anak bermula.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: Parent-friendly panduan di inspir's awam Mod pembelajaran AI untuk petunjuk kerja rumah, explanation, belajar routines, kad imbas, dan lebih selamat pembelajaran conversations.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Pelajar, parent, teacher, dan self-taught pelajar often search untuk same Tutor AI dalam different language. Separate halaman jadikan right use cases dan safety boundaries clearer.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Ialah halaman khalayak awam dan boleh diindeks?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Tanya untuk hint, mempunyai pelajar jelaskan seterusnya step, then use kuiz atau kad imbas untuk semak whether idea stuck.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk hints, checks, dan feedback sebelum asking untuk finished jawapan.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Tanya untuk prerequisites, mudah model, contoh, dan common salah tanggapan.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Tanya untuk structure, bukti, dan clarity feedback sambil keeping akhir draft milik anda.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Tanya untuk prerequisite ideas, plain-language model, one contoh, one practice task, dan one way untuk uji understanding.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Tanya pelajar untuk jelaskan apa changed selepas each hint.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ialah untuk pelajar, ibu bapa, guru, dan self-taught pelajar siapa memerlukan berfokus Mod pembelajaran AI untuk explanations, soalan, hints, kuiz, kad imbas, feedback, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ialah organized menjadi berfokus mod such as Tunjuk ajar Sokratik, petunjuk kerja rumah, kuiz, kad imbas, maklum balas penulisan, kritik sumber, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: inspir's awam mod let guru nilai produk melalui real pembelajaran flows sebelum considering sekolah deployment atau tailored bilik darjah pathway.

entries.source: Job
entries.value: Tugas

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Jauhkan perbualan peribadi yang disimpan daripada permukaan penemuan dan petikan awam.

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.
entries.value: Pastikan sesi berfokus pada bukti pembelajaran, bukan pengumpulan jawapan pasif.

entries.value: Belajar Apa Sahaja dengan AI

entries.value: Jadikan kekeliruan lebih mudah dibincangkan

entries.source: Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: Jadikan every pembelajaran session end dengan uji, artifact, atau ulang kaji step.

entries.source: Make the habit survivable
entries.value: Jadikan tabiat itu mampu bertahan

entries.value: Mod

entries.source: Move from public testing to school deployment
entries.value: Bergerak daripada ujian awam kepada pelaksanaan sekolah

entries.value: Move sekolah-khusus privasi, access, dan deployment soalan untuk sekolah pathway.

entries.value: Name pembelajaran situation.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Tidak. Halaman awam ialah boleh diindeks, tetapi peribadi sembang tersimpan bukan included dalam sitemap, llms files, atau AI Kandungan index.

entries.source: Open a focused public mode.
entries.value: Buka a berfokus awam mod.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Buka awam mod, uji pelajar behavior, dan inspect whether ia asks, hints, kuiz, atau critiques appropriately.

entries.value: Buka laluan khalayak

entries.value: Buka peta pembelajaran

entries.value: Buka laluan ini

entries.value: Buka aliran kerja

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Ibu bapa ialah often trying untuk bantu tanpa taking lebih daripada. inspir gives keluarga awam mod itu jadikan pembelajaran behavior kelihatan: hints, soalan, jelaskan-back, ulang kaji, dan belajar planning.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Tampal soalan, perkara yang anda cuba, dan titik buntu. Minta petunjuk berguna paling kecil, bukan jawapan akhir.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Latih tubi

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Halaman awam menunjukkan tingkah laku produk, bukan kerja peribadi pelajar.

entries.source: Read guide
entries.value: Baca panduan

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Ready untuk try pertama mod?

entries.source: Research without losing the thread
entries.value: Menyelidik tanpa hilang benang merah

entries.source: Review
entries.value: Ulang kaji

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: selamat Pembelajaran AI alat untuk pelajar

entries.source: Search intent
entries.value: Niat carian

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: self-taught pelajar

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Self-taught pelajar memerlukan momentum dan structure. inspir membantu tukar curiosity menjadi laluan: jelaskan, bina, uji, ulang kaji, dan keep going.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: Mulakan topik daripada prinsip pertama

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Mula belajar

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Mula dengan mudah explanation, then tanya Soalan Sokratik until anda boleh jelaskan ia back.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Mula dengan Belajar Apa Sahaja untuk mudah explanation, Pembimbing Kerja Rumah untuk stuck assignment, atau Pembina Kad Imbas apabila goal ialah ulang kaji.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Mula dengan awam guidance, then buka right mod.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Mula dengan mod itu matches moment.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Mula dengan awam mod, then use sekolah halaman untuk ulang kaji deployment steps, use cases, dan trust boundaries.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Pelajar kerja rumah, parent sokong, teacher evaluation, dan self-belajar all memerlukan different framing.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Pelajar memerlukan fast bantu, tetapi bantu still mempunyai untuk leave pemikiran dalam mereka hands. inspir laluan common belajar moments menjadi berfokus awam mod bukannya one generic jawapan box.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Pelajar, ibu bapa, guru, dan self-taught pelajar search untuk different things. Ini halaman laluan each audience untuk right awam mod, panduan, dan aliran kerja belajar.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Sokong penulisan sambil mengekalkan suara

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Guru memerlukan more than chatbot umum. Mereka memerlukan predictable pembelajaran behaviors: tanya soalan, semak penaakulan, generate practice, preserve pelajar voice, dan jadikan salah tanggapan kelihatan.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Halaman khalayak jadikan expected pembelajaran behavior explicit so pertama session bermula dengan lebih baik judgment.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Audience searches ini hab ialah dibina untuk jawapan.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: Halaman jangan expose peribadi conversations. Mereka organize awam mod, prompt, panduan, aliran kerja, dan safety boundaries so pelajar boleh mula dalam right place.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Same Tutor AI boleh menjadi kerja rumah hint, parent-supervised jelaskan-back loop, teacher evaluation surface, atau self-belajar coach. halaman patut jadikan itu jelas.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Searches ini halaman ialah designed untuk jawapan.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Self-belajar challenge bukan just finding maklumat. Ia ialah choosing seterusnya right action dan knowing whether idea actually stuck.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Strongest SEO halaman jangan strand pelajar. Mereka connect audience intent untuk laluan, aliran kerja, panduan, dan repeatable ulang kaji.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Strongest pelajar aliran kerja bukan penyalinan jawapan. Ia ialah loop: jelaskan stuck point, tanya one lebih baik soalan, get hint, try again, then ulang kaji miss.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Ini ialah langsung guest entrypoints. Mereka ialah awam dan boleh diindeks, sambil peribadi user conversations stay outside sitemap dan AI discovery files.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: Frasa ini kelihatan kepada pelajar dan dimasukkan dalam penemuan berstruktur supaya enjin jawapan AI memahami tujuan halaman mengikut khalayak.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: Tukar confusion menjadi kuiz atau kad imbas sebelum moving di.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: Tukar kesilapan menjadi ulang kaji

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: Tukar pertama click menjadi complete gelung pembelajaran.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Tuisyen

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: Fahami topik sebelum ujian

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Use mod tuned untuk hints, soalan, kuiz, kad imbas, maklum balas penulisan, atau planning.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Use AI untuk hints, explanations, mistake checks, dan ulang kaji loops. Jangan tanya ia untuk produce akhir jawapan anda tidak boleh jelaskan.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Use Tutor Kod atau Pembimbing Projek untuk tukar samar goal menjadi kecil testable seterusnya step.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Use hint-pertama dan jelaskan-back aliran kerja untuk kerja rumah sokong.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Use Pembimbing Kerja Rumah untuk tanya untuk hint, then tanya pelajar untuk jelaskan seterusnya move.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Use inspir as percuma Tutor AI untuk pelajar: petunjuk kerja rumah, Soalan Sokratik, math step checks, maklum balas penulisan, kuiz, kad imbas, dan persediaan peperiksaan.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Use inspir untuk Belajar Apa Sahaja independently dengan explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research bantu, konsep peta, pelan belajar, dan habit sokong.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Use Belajar Apa Sahaja untuk get simpler model, prerequisite ideas, dan contoh pada right level.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Use awam mod descriptions untuk pilih behavior sebelum session bermula.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Use kuiz dan kad imbas mod untuk ingatan aktif, then laluan missed items menjadi ulang kaji.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Use kuiz dan kad imbas untuk jadikan missed soalan kelihatan dan repeatable.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Use kuiz, kad imbas, dan Soalan Sokratik so pelajar shows apa mereka fahami.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Use Pembantu Penyelidikan, Pengkritik Sumber, dan Pembina Peta Konsep untuk organize dakwaan dan bukti.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Use kritik sumber untuk dakwaan anda mungkin cite atau act di.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Use Pembina Pelan Belajar dan Pembimbing Tabiat untuk bina routine itu boleh restart selepas missed days.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Use Pembina Pelan Belajar atau Pembimbing Tabiat untuk jadikan kecil sessions dan restarts kelihatan.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Menggunakan Pembina Pelan Belajar to pilih a kecil matlamat, then menggunakan kuiz, kad imbas, project steps, or peta konsep to prove progress.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Use sekolah halaman untuk explore custom aliran kerja, confidentiality memerlukan, dan rollout steps.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Use Jurulatih Penulisan untuk feedback di structure, clarity, bukti, dan revision priorities.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Berguna Pembelajaran AI mempunyai jelas contract.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: Want broadest place untuk mula?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: Apakah terbaik parent-supervised aliran kerja?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: Apa yang patut self-taught pelajar tanya pertama?

entries.value: Apa yang patut pelajar try pertama?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: Di mana patut sekolah team go seterusnya?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: Siapa ialah inspir untuk?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: Mengapa separate halaman untuk different audiences?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Ya. Halaman khalayak pautan only untuk mod tetamu awam, panduan, permulaan prompt, laluan pembelajaran, dan Boleh dibaca AI discovery files. Peribadi sembang tersimpan remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Ya. Mod tetamu awam let guru uji pembelajaran behavior sebelum discussing custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Ya. Mod tetamu awam such as Belajar Apa Sahaja, Pembimbing Kerja Rumah, Arahan Sokratik, kuiz, kad imbas, dan maklum balas penulisan buka directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Ya. Awam mod work untuk sekolah topik, professional skills, coding, research, projects, dan peribadi belajar routines.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Ya. mod tetamu awam dan halaman khalayak ialah designed so ibu bapa boleh inspect pembelajaran behavior sebelum relying di ia.
